name: czrecoilframe_constructor
description: CZRecoilFrame::Constructor builds the MFC frame shell, creates the main window, attaches the main menu, initializes menu/runtime state, and publishes shell globals.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /DUINT_PTR=UINT COFF byte compare currently fails for czrecoilframe_constructor: 658 unmasked mismatches after masking 224 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 919 bytes and the VC object body is 848 bytes with 7 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.

The reviewed byte drift starts at the function entry and includes EH prologue, helper calls for vtable symbol materialization, MFC CreateEx call shape, register scheduling, and class/source-context codegen differences.

The native smoke constructs the global RecoilApp before AfxWinInit, registers the RecoilClass window class, uses a test MYMENU resource with the original menu IDs, supplies test-local CWnd providers to avoid MFC dispatch through placeholder named vtables, calls CZRecoilFrame::Constructor, and verifies stable constructor post-state and archive-bank side effects in an isolated process.
